title: The Road to Sabaody

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nyuuu~, they look just like each other.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Okay Sanji, we'll go on ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Are you saying this is my fault!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oh, yeah, I could've done that.
